record.bridgyOriginalText: And here's what nobody talks about. You also need to stop assuming your AI tool is a vault. It's not. Anything you paste into a prompt can be logged, stored, or used to train future models. If you're typing client details, proprietary code, or personal data into a free AI tool, you're making a choice about security that you might regret. Perfect privacy doesn't exist in most consumer AI platforms. Read the terms. Assume your input is not confidential. That's not paranoia (4/6)
